zh.<Norbury, Marbury, Cheshire, England>: 英國英格蘭爾馬布里諾波利 亞爾 馬爾帕斯
zh.Norbury, Marbury, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾馬布里諾波利 亞爾 馬爾帕斯
zh.Stoke D'abernon, Surrey, England: 英國英格蘭素瑞斯托克 達阿波農
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Norbury於1335年出生在英國爾南特維其時，他的父親Roger Bulkeley29歲，母親Ellen Bulkeley25歲。他於大約1368年與Matilda Pembridge在英國英格蘭爾馬布里諾波利 亞爾 馬爾帕斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世在英國英格蘭爾馬布里諾波利 亞爾 馬爾帕斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Norbury于1335年出生在英国爾南特維其时，他的父亲Roger Bulkeley29岁，母亲Ellen Bulkeley25岁。他于大约1368年与Matilda Pembridge在英国英格兰爾馬布里諾波利 亞爾 馬爾帕斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世在英国英格兰爾馬布里諾波利 亞爾 馬爾帕斯。

nameMeanings.name: Norbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from any of various places so named, for example in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Shropshire, Staffordshire, and Surrey, so called from Old English north ‘north’ + burh ‘fortress, fortified town’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Norbury was born in 1335, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, his father, Roger Bulkeley, was 29 and his mother, Ellen Bulkeley, was 25. He married Matilda Pembridge about 1368, in Norbury near Malpas, Marbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in Norbury near Malpas, Marbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Norburyが1335年にイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチで生まれた時，父Roger Bulkeleyは29歳，母Ellen Bulkeleyは25歳であった。約1368年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマルブリーノーブリー ネアル マルプアスでMatilda Pembridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマルブリーノーブリー ネアル マルプアスで死去した。

ko.Norbury, Marbury, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 마버이 노르버이 니아어 맬파스
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Norbury(이)가 1335년 영국 체실르 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Bulkeley(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Bulkeley(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 마버이 노르버이 니아어 맬파스에서 Matilda Pembridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 마버이 노르버이 니아어 맬파스에서 사망했다.
